rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure; it only checks evidence-claim alignment for one dimension (R1.2).
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not disclosed for all recommendations; only one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 35% reduction in magnitude-dependent bias) is flagged.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression: it introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by overstating the reduction in magnitude-dependent bias.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
